text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Mejiro Bright awaits her own debut, Mejiro
Dober continues to train for her next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright notices the change in Mejiro Dober
after her debut, and they make a promise to
forge new Mejiro legacies together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Under the setting sun, Mejiro Dober swears to
compete in the Triple Tiara and Mejiro Bright in
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to prepare for the Triple Tiara, Mejiro
Dober decides to run in the Hanshin Juvenile
Fillies first!
